query:
SELECT codigoCetip, emissorNome, rating, indexador, 
       scoreMatch, tipoMatch, ntnbReferencia,
       CAST(durationAnos AS DECIMAL(5,2)) as duration_ativo,
       CAST(ntnbDuration AS DECIMAL(5,2)) as duration_ntnb,
       ABS(CAST(durationAnos AS DECIMAL(5,2)) - CAST(ntnbDuration AS DECIMAL(5,2))) as gap_duration,
       CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(8,4)) as zspread
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE dataReferencia = (SELECT MAX(dataReferencia) FROM spread_analysis)
  AND scoreMatch >= 0.90 AND scoreMatch < 0.95
ORDER BY scoreMatch;

SELECT codigoCetip, emissorNome, rating, indexador, 
       scoreMatch, tipoMatch, ntnbReferencia,
       CAST(durationAnos AS DECIMAL(5,2)) as duration_ativo,
       CAST(ntnbDuration AS DECIMAL(5,2)) as duration_ntnb,
       ABS(CAST(durationAnos AS DECIMAL(5,2)) - CAST(ntnbDuration AS DECIMAL(5,2))) as gap_duration,
       CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(8,4)) as zspread
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE dataReferencia = (SELECT MAX(dataReferencia) FROM spread_analysis)
  AND scoreMatch >= 0.90 AND scoreMatch < 0.95
ORDER BY scoreMatch;
